name: Bloor-Yorkville Soccer Fest
description:
Join us for a neighbourhood-wide celebration of soccer's biggest event in Toronto! Featuring live freestyle performances by world-renowned athletes, interactive fan experiences including Juggle Zone, Knee Grab, Urban Run and a curated Neighbourhood Soccer Trail of things to do. 

With high-energy programming and immersive activations, we're excited to showcase Bloor-Yorkville signature blend of culture, cuisine, retail, and wellness.
